briefs.title: BC Streamlined Permitting Rules Updated: High-Output Wind and Solar Projects Get Faster Approvals
briefs.summary: BC updated its renewable energy permitting rules, creating two tiers of approval. Wind and solar projects over 5 MW now qualify for the fastest 'level 3' streamlined permitting process, meaning fewer steps and quicker government sign-off.
briefs.action_required: If you develop wind or solar projects over 5 MW in BC, review the new level 3 permitting stream for faster approvals.
